<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Config; use Symfony\Component\Config\FileLocator as BaseFileLocator; use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\KernelInterface; /** * FileLocator uses the KernelInterface to locate resources in bundles. * * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ class FileLocator extends BaseFileLocator { public function __construct( private KernelInterface $kernel, ) { parent::__construct(); } public function locate(string $file, ?string $currentPath = null, bool $first = true): string|array { if (isset($file[0]) && '@' === $file[0]) { $resource = $this->kernel->locateResource($file); return $first ? $resource : [$resource]; } return parent::locate($file, $currentPath, $first); } }
